name: The Love Nest
sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; photos need owner approval before use
title: A cosy penthouse made for two by the sea.
tagline: The intimate Ostend hideaway for rest, romance, and reconnection.
description: The Love Nest is the clearest co-hosted addition in the public listings: a cosy Ostend penthouse for two, close to the beach, with terraces, outdoor pool/shower, and Laurens listed as co-host.

media.caption: Owner-approved Love Nest hero photo needed
Terrace and outdoor pool gallery slot

externalLinks.label: Booking.com
externalLinks.note: Cross-platform reference from source doc; confirm before parity display

listingHighlights.label: Beach proximity
listingHighlights.value: Airbnb describes the penthouse as less than 70 m from the sandy beach and within walking distance of the station.

listingHighlights.label: Outdoor terraces
listingHighlights.value: Two large wooden terraces, side sea view, outdoor pool, outdoor shower, sun loungers, and electric BBQ are listed publicly.

listingHighlights.label: Self check-in
listingHighlights.value: Guests can check in with a code/key lockbox.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: The Love Nest is the intimate Ostend option for two guests: compact, romantic, and built around terrace life by the sea.

stayStory.title: The Airbnb proof
stayStory.text: The listing has a high public rating, strong review count, and a clear co-host connection to Laurens.

stayStory.title: The atmosphere
stayStory.text: This page should lean into evening, terraces, sea air, and the private feeling of a small hideaway.

stayStory.title: The handoff
stayStory.text: The site can guide the guest, but live dates, payment, cancellation, and messaging stay on Airbnb.

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live dates, price, cancellation policy, and final availability.
Select the correct guest count, with 2 guests maximum as the current public maximum.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking layer is approved.
Use House of Wander for story, comparison, guidance, and source-labelled decision support.
houseNotes: No pets and no children are noted in the source docs.
Carbon monoxide alarm not reported; smoke alarm listed.
locationNote: The public Airbnb listing places The Love Nest in central Ostend, less than 70 m from the sandy beach and less than 15 minutes walking from the station.
sourceNotes: Public Airbnb facts were checked on May 27, 2026 without login.
Airbnb-hosted photos are catalogued only as references and are not displayed on the site.
Cross-platform links from Booking.com and BedandBreakfast.eu are retained as references, not live parity claims.
Live price, availability, cancellation, payment, and messaging remain on Airbnb.

amigoStayPlan.title: Fit guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can explain that this is the romantic two-person coastal option.

amigoStayPlan.title: Trust guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can summarize the public Airbnb rating, review themes, check-in, and host/co-host structure.

amigoStayPlan.title: Booking guardrail
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo keeps price, availability, cancellation, and payment on Airbnb.

amigoPrompts.label: Who is The Love Nest for?
amigoPrompts.answer: The Love Nest is best framed as the intimate Ostend option for two guests: beach nearby, terraces, outdoor bathing, and a high public Airbnb rating. Live dates and price still need Airbnb confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: Can I see photos?
amigoPrompts.answer: The public Airbnb page has photos, but this prototype does not copy Airbnb-hosted images. The team should provide owner-approved images before the House of Wander page uses them.

amigoPrompts.label: How does booking work?
amigoPrompts.answer: House of Wander can guide the decision, but Airbnb should handle live dates, price, cancellation, payment, and messaging for now.
